'''Norquest''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] male and the last [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Cilpar]]. Along with [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Boren Tascl]], Norquest ruled Cilpar and the surrounding space from his Kiidan fortress. After the death of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and the expansion of the [[Alliance of Free Planets]], Norquest conceded that it was time to hand Cilpar over to the Alliance, but Tascl had other plans. Despite their planned defense, Norquest and Tascl were [[Mission to Cilpar|deposed]] by the Cilparian resistance with the help of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and local Alliance operatives.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 4|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 4]] {{1st}}
